session.assistant:
## Results Summary
**make fast-ci failed** with exit code 2 due to Prettier formatting issues.
### Detailed Breakdown
**Prettier Check - FAILED:** - Code style issues found in 2 files: - `docs/learned/integrations/github-review-decision.md` - `docs/learned/tui/status-indicators.md` - Fix available with: `prettier --write`
**All Other Checks - PASSED:** - Lint: All checks passed - Format check: 1674 files already formatted - Markdown check: OK - Exec reference check: OK - Type checking (ty): All checks passed - Unit tests (erk): 5797 passed in 12.76s - Unit tests (erk-dev): 136 passed in 4.44s - Unit tests (erk-statusline): 115 passed in 0.79s - Unit tests (erk-mcp): 24 passed (output truncated but completed)
### Root Cause
The `fast-ci` target failed at the Prettier formatting validation step. Two markdown files in the `docs/learned/` directory do not conform to Prettier's code style requirements.
